tluaTablePositionalErrors.tlua(3,17): error TS1005: '=' expected.
tluaTablePositionalErrors.tlua(6,17): error TS1109: Expression expected.
tluaTablePositionalErrors.tlua(9,13): error TS1136: Property assignment expected.


==== tluaTablePositionalErrors.tlua (3 errors) ====
    // A computed key without `=`/`:` is a natural error.
    declare k: string;
    local a = { [k] };
                    ~
!!! error TS1005: '=' expected.
    
    // A keyed form missing its value.
    local b = { x = };
                    ~
!!! error TS1109: Expression expected.
    
    // A bare separator.
    local c = { , };
                ~
!!! error TS1136: Property assignment expected.
